title: Mixed Archive Images Mini Fixture
capture_note: Checked-in ZIP probe for Story 224. It packages one repo-owned two-page image-directory fixture under a shared `pages/` parent plus one intentionally unsupported plain-text member so the bounded mixed-archive seam can prove grouped image-member routing into the maintained `images_dir` recipe without claiming broad photo-album or heterogeneous archive support.

members.notes: This page belongs to the bounded grouped image-member slice. The route rows should keep per-member provenance while sharing one grouped `--input-images` launch into `recipe-images-ocr-html-mvp.yaml`.
This second page proves the bounded shared-parent grouping contract and stable downstream page ordering on the extracted directory.

members.source: repo-authored member embedded only in the ZIP fixture
members.notes: This unsupported text member exists to prove non-image members remain explicit blocked rows instead of being silently folded into the grouped image launch.

supported_scope: archive-relative member manifest and grouped image-member route rows
one grouped `--input-images` launch into `recipe-images-ocr-html-mvp.yaml` for a shared-parent page-image set
explicit blocked rows for unsupported non-image members
known_gaps: No broad photo-album clustering or arbitrary image-set semantics
No nested archives or attachment extraction
No broad mixed-archive normalization into a single combined bundle
